meaning: <拉>Juris Scientiae Doctor法学博士(=Doctor of Juristic Science)
examples: This paper discusses how to incorporate JSD modelling technique to create an Object-Oriented MIS analysis model.
JSP and JSD, often taught in university software design courses, had a fairly rich notation and accompanying semantics for constructing a system model.
However, the construction technology with JSD cable conveyer is used to lay cable, which has many advantages such as safety, saving cost, ensuring period and quality.
